title: Home Appliance Repair Mumbai
html:
Expert home appliance repair · Mumbai

Reliable Home Appliance Repair & Support

Skilled technicians for in-home service. Transparent quotes, quality spares where needed, and repairs only after you approve — for washing machines, refrigerators, ACs, microwaves & TVs.

Book a repair now 9987842957
  • Same-day slots when available
  • Multi-brand
  • 24×7 booking & queries
Washing machine Refrigerator AC repair Microwave TV repair
24/7Support for booking
ExpertsTrained technicians
Multi-brandMajor appliances
ClearQuote before repair

Our specialized services

Comprehensive repair and maintenance for major home appliance brands. We are an independent service provider — not a brand-authorised centre unless stated in writing.

Washing machine

  • Fully & semi-automatic
  • Front & top load repairs
  • Drum, drain & PCB issues
  • Installation & servicing
Call for details

Refrigerator repair

  • Single & double door
  • Side-by-side models
  • Gas charging & compressor checks
  • Cooling & defrost faults
Call for details

Air conditioner (AC)

  • Split & window AC
  • Gas top-up & deep cleaning
  • Inverter PCB & sensor faults
  • Annual maintenance support
Call for details
Popular

Microwave oven

  • Solo, grill & convection
  • Magnetron & board faults
  • Heating & spark issues
  • Touchpad & door interlock
Call for details
TV & display

LED / smart TV

  • LED, LCD & smart TVs
  • Backlight & power supply
  • Board-level repair where feasible
  • Software & HDMI glitches
Call for details

Service across Mumbai

Doorstep visits where possible. We aim for prompt attendance in Western, Central & Harbour corridors.

  • Home appliance repair & maintenance
  • Transparent estimates before work begins
  • Quality spare parts with warranty explained on invoice
  • Independent provider — brand names on inner pages describe appliance types we service

How it works

Getting your appliance fixed in four simple steps.

  1. 1Service requestCall or book online — we note your appliance & area.
  2. 2Technician assignedWe align a technician for your location & time window.
  3. 3DiagnosisOn-site inspection with a clear quote before repair.
  4. 4RepairWork completed with your approval; warranty as agreed.

Why customers choose us

Skilled team

Experienced with common & complex faults across brands.

Fair pricing

No surprise charges — estimate before we proceed.

Fast response

Same-day slots when available; 24×7 call support.

Quality parts

Components chosen for durability; warranty on labour & parts as stated.

Major Mumbai localities — ask if yours is not listed.

Product names & logos belong to their owners. Brand pages describe appliances we repair, not an endorsement.

Disclaimer: We are an independent home appliance service provider and are not affiliated with any specific brand unless explicitly stated. Repairs are performed by trained technicians. Service charges apply; warranty on spare parts & labour as agreed on your invoice.
meta_description: Reliable home appliance repair in Mumbai — washing machine, fridge, AC, microwave & TV. Book online or call 9987842957. Independent service, clear quotes.
